since_last: 68% of 104 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.50%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 68% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.67% · BTC -0.05% · Gold +0.05% · Nasdaq100 +1.31%. 68% of 104 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.50%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.50%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +7.94%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +7.94%, INTC +5.18%, AMD +5.12%, SKHY +5.10%, MU +4.97%. Laggards: ADBE -2.96%, INTU -2.77%, NOW -2.61%, ADBE -2.40%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.15% at $123.81
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
